title: Industrial Safety
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module introduces employees to industrial safety practices followed at Jindal Stainless Limited. It covers workplace hazards, safe work practices, emergency procedures, and employee responsibilities.
learningObjectives: Understand the importance of workplace safety.

content.introduction: Safety is the highest priority in every manufacturing facility. Every employee is responsible for maintaining a safe workplace by following established safety procedures and reporting unsafe conditions.
content.purpose: Industrial Safety aims to prevent accidents, protect employees, safeguard company assets, and ensure uninterrupted manufacturing operations.
employeeResponsibilities: Immediately report accidents and near misses.
emergencyResponse: Move to the designated assembly point.
content.summary: Industrial Safety is everyone's responsibility. Following safety procedures, using PPE correctly, and reporting hazards help create a safe and productive workplace.
